channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Chick-fil-A: Free Medium Waffle Fries – Spot the Cows App Game
item.guid: Chick-fil-A-Free Medium Waffle Fries – Spot the Cows-2026-07-11
item.description: Play Spot the Cows in the Chick-fil-A app to earn one free medium Waffle Fries, valid through July 13. (Through July 13, 2026)

item.title: White Castle: Free Cheese Fries – Code CHEESY
item.guid: White Castle-Free Cheese Fries – Code CHEESY-2026-07-11
item.description: Use promo code CHEESY online, in-app, or in store to get free cheese fries with any order through July 12. (Through July 12, 2026)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza (Any Crust, Any Toppings)
item.guid: Domino's-$9.99 Any Pizza (Any Crust, Any Toppings-2026-07-11
item.description: Get any Domino's pizza with any crust including Parmesan Stuffed Crust and up to 7 toppings for $9.99 via app or online. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Pizza Hut: $9.99 Any Pizza Deal
item.description: Score any Pizza Hut pizza for $9.99 when you select the deal online or in the app through late July. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 McValue Meal Deal
item.description: Bundle a sandwich, side, and drink for just $5 via the McDonald's app at participating locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: Cravings Value Menu – 10 Items at $3 or Less
item.guid: Taco Bell-Cravings Value Menu – 10 Items at $3 or -2026-07-11
item.description: Taco Bell's Cravings Value Menu offers ten fan-favorite items including burritos, tacos, and more all priced at $3 or less. (Ongoing)

item.title: The Halal Guys: World Cup Fan Feast Meal (Feeds 4–5)
item.guid: The Halal Guys-World Cup Fan Feast Meal (Feeds 4–5)-2026-07-11
item.description: Through July 19, the Fan Feast meal serves four to five guests with protein, rice, pita, toppings, and sauce packs for World Cup watch parties. (Through July 19, 2026)

item.title: Arby's: $7.99 Meat & 3 Box
item.description: Arby's Meat & 3 Box includes a Roast Beef or Crispy Chicken Sandwich plus three sides and a small drink for $7.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: Sonic: $7 Big Deal Meal
item.description: Sonic's $7 Big Deal Meal is available nationwide as a standing value bundle — check the app for your nearest location. (Ongoing)
